name: Roasted Vegetable Quinoa Bowl
tagline: Roasted broccoli, sweet potato, chickpeas, quinoa, tahini drizzle
highlight: Sheet-pan dinner, no eggs, leftovers improve overnight

hero.alt: Quinoa bowl with roasted broccoli, sweet potato, chickpeas, tahini drizzle
hero.caption: quinoa bowl — roasted veg, tahini

healthFacts: Quinoa is a complete protein (9 essential amino acids) — uncommon for plants.
Chickpeas + quinoa together provide ~17g of complete plant protein per bowl.

steps.title: Cook the quinoa
steps.detail: Rinse quinoa. Combine with 2 cups water and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil, then simmer covered 15 minutes. Rest 5 minutes off heat. Fluff.
steps.tip: Rinsing washes off saponins (the bitter coating). Skipping makes quinoa taste soapy.

steps.title: Roast veg and chickpeas
steps.detail: Toss broccoli, sweet potato, and chickpeas with olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt. Spread on a sheet pan. Roast 425°F for 22 minutes, tossing once.
steps.tip: Pat the chickpeas dry before tossing — wet chickpeas steam, dry ones crisp.

steps.title: Whisk tahini drizzle
steps.detail: Whisk tahini, lemon juice, grated garlic, salt, and 3–4 tbsp water until smooth and pourable. Tahini will seize first — keep adding water.
steps.tip: Adding ice-cold water makes tahini whip up paler and creamier.

steps.title: Build the bowls
steps.detail: Scoop quinoa into bowls. Pile vegetables and chickpeas on top. Drizzle generously with tahini. Lemon wedge on the side.
steps.tip: A handful of fresh herbs (parsley, dill) on top makes it feel restaurant.

media.alt: Built quinoa bowl with tahini drizzle
media.caption: build the bowls
